characters.description: Akito HyugaBiographical InformationFull nameAkito HyugaNickname(s)The Ghost of HannibalNationalityJapaneseAge17Borna.t.b.July 4, 2000RY 211, Messidor 16thStatusAlivePhysical appearanceGenderMaleHairBlueEye ColorBlueHeight176 cm (5'9")Zodiac signCancerBlood typeAPersonal BackgroundRank(s)Captain (Former)Lieutenant (Formerly)Second Lieutenant (Formerly)Occupation(s)Military Officer (Former)Knightmare Pilot (Former)Relation(s)Akito's Father (Father)Hyuga's Mother (Mother)Shin Hyuga Shaing(Half-Brother)Allegiance(s)Europia United(Former)wZERO(Former)Knightmare(s)GardmareAlexanderAlexander LiberteOtherSeeCode Geass: Akito the ExiledReal World InformationFirst AppearanceThe Wyvern ArrivesLast AppearanceTo Beloved OnesCreator(s)CLAMPTakahiro KimuraVoice Actor(s)Miyu Irino,Ryōka Yuzuki(child) (Japanese)Micah Solusod,Apphia Yu(child) (English)Federico Viola (Italian)Akito Hyuga(日向アキトHyūga Akito) is the titular character and the main protagonist ofCode Geass: Akito the Exiled. He is a former Lieutenant of thewZEROunderLeila Malcal. Akito is a young man with blue eyes and long blue hair tied in a single braid, and is shown in promotional art wielding a kodachi with a white hilt and square guard. In the fifth episode he cuts off his braid, but later begins growing it out again. Akito is shown as a very introverted person, a loner, and very much isolated within his squad. He is also shown to have a very twisted personality, due to his traumatizing childhood, the geass command his brother gave him, and his hatred for his brother. Akito is shown as a very introverted person, a loner, and very much isolated within his squad. He is also shown to have a very twisted personality, due to his traumatizing childhood, the geass command his brother gave him, and his hatred for his brother. Akito is quite intelligent, as he assists Leila in battle planning, and uses the geass command, given to him by his brother, to aid him in combat. His tactical knowledge combined with his fighting skills is one of the reasons he has survived all of his suicide missions. He can also be very clever in terms of resolving a conflict without violence (shown when he subduedLeila Malcal's step-brother and fianceIoan Malcal). He is very mature for someone his age (when comparing his personality withYukiya NaruseandRyo Sayamawho are the same age as he is). But after staying with the elderly women in Warsaw, he is shown to have a softer persona and care for his comrades. He shown to dislike eating fish.

characters.name: Alessandra Dolos
characters.description: Alessandra DolosBiographical InformationFull nameAlessandra DolosNickname(s)Sandra"Blade Gangster"NationalityBritannianStatusAlivePhysical appearanceGenderFemaleHairRedEye ColorGreenPersonal BackgroundTitle(s)ChampionOccupation(s)Competitive KMF League PilotAllegiance(s)FireballsKnightmare(s)PrytwenAlessandra Dolos(アレッサンドラ・ドロスAressandora Dorosu) is a pilot in the Jousting & Formation Competitive KMF League, and the leader of the reigning champions, the Fireballs. She isSokkia'schildhood friend. While loud and brash even from childhood, Alessandra showcases great courage and loyalty to her friends and teammates, who she calls "her babies." Despite coming from a criminal family, she was also religious, praying to the emperor before lunch. Alessandra was born to into the Dolos Family, a noble family tied to the criminal underworld of Britannia. Prior to 2011 a.t.b, the Dolos had many business partners and were greatly feared. This all changed with the development of theknightmare frameand the deployment ofKnightpoliceby theBritannian Police Force. Comapred to their thick armor and powerful sensors, the handheld weapons of the Dolos' enforcers were like "pea shooters." Thereafter, the Dolos Family was broken apart and its business partners turned their eyes to theAreaswhere the law was much more spotty. The Dolos would eventual gain amnesty and aid from the government through the Citizens Rehabilitation Program sponsored by PrinceOdysseus eu Britannia, as long as they worked toward the good of the public.

characters.name: Alice
characters.description: AliceBiographical InformationNickname(s)Alice the SpeedNationalityHonorary BritannianAge15StatusAlivePhysical appearanceGenderFemaleHairBlondeEye ColorRedHeight155 cmPersonal BackgroundTitle(s)Member of theIrregularsPersonal Knight of Princess NunnallyOccupation(s)StudentSpyKnightmare PilotKnightAllegiance(s)Holy Britannian EmpireBritannian MilitaryIrregularsAshford AcademyKnightmare(s)GX 01 AlphaCode GeassReal World InformationSeriesCode Geass: Nightmare of NunnallyAlice(アリスArisu) is a tomboyish girl who isNunnally'sbest friend and classmate in the alternative timeline mangaCode Geass: Nightmare of Nunnally. She is very caring and will protect Nunnally if she is in trouble. In reality, she is secretly an agent of theIrregularsassigned to the surveillance ofMilly Ashfordunder the cover identity of a middle school student. Ashford Academy Alice's official measurements. Alice is a strong-willed and tough girl who always has herself together. Despite her tomboyish personality, she is an extremely caring and sweet girl who gets along well with both her classmates and her Irregular "sisters". Alice has zero tolerance for bullying and will humiliate or even beat up anyone who bullies or harasses others as Ekaterina Sforza and her two friends learned the hard way. Despite appearing seemly normal, Alice is deeply troubled because of the tragedies of her past, namely losing her paraplegic little sister who died in a fire. Alice has always felt guilt of being powerless to protect the one she cared about. Similar toSuzaku Kururugi, Alice became a Britannian soldier and obtained her Geass in hopes of preventing the same kind of tragedy from repeating. She also feels guilty about hiding her true identity as a Irregular special agent from Nunnally who considers Alice her best friend. Even though Alice is a good person at heart, she can be quite ruthless when she needs to be and has no qualms about killing either in self-defense or to protect others. This was shown during the battle at Lake Kawaguchi and when she killed Mao, and laterRolo vi Britannia, for kidnapping and trying to murder Nunnally.

characters.actor_name: Akeno Watanabe (Japanese)Dorothy Elias-Fahn (English)Claudia Razzi (Italian)Sabine Jaeger(German)Laura Zichy (French)
characters.description: Alicia LohmeyerBiographical InformationFull nameAlicia LohmeyerNationalityBritannianStatusDeceasedDeatha.t.b.2018Physical appearanceGenderFemaleHairLight BrownEye ColorBluePersonal BackgroundTitle(s)ViceroyNunnally'sAdvisorOccupation(s)Civil ServantAllegiance(s)Holy Britannian EmpireBritannian MilitaryOtherSeeHoly Britannian EmpireReal World InformationFirst AppearanceThe Abandoned MaskLast AppearanceFinal Battle Tokyo IIVoice Actor(s)Akeno Watanabe (Japanese)Dorothy Elias-Fahn (English)Claudia Razzi (Italian)Sabine Jaeger(German)Laura Zichy (French)Alicia Lohmeyer(アリシア・ローマイヤArishia Rōmaiya) was an aide and advisor assigned by theHoly Britannian Empireto observeNunnallyupon her appointment as the newViceroyofArea 11. Alicia is a quintessential Britannian who regards Nunnally's pro-Eleven political stance with frigid opposition, but dutifully obeys regardless. However, she is willing to tell Nunnally her opinion, regardless of what Nunnally says, as long as it is for the better of Britannia. Despite the fact that she is supposed to be Nunnally's aid, Nunnally does not trust her; aware of the fact that Alicia Lohmeyer would find any chance to seize power to make living conditions worse for the Elevens should Nunnally let her guard down. Alicia also does not hesitate to lie to Nunnally about certain actions and abuse Nunnally's authority behind her back. This is evident when Alicia orders Kallen's execution, despite the fact that Nunnally would be completely against such a thing. As a Britannian, she also shows very little respect for Suzaku, despite the fact that he was the Knight of Seven at the time. Lohmeyer preparing to fire at the crowd of Zeros. characters.description: Alicia LohmeyerBiographical InformationFull nameAlicia LohmeyerNationalityBritannianStatusDeceasedDeatha.t.b.2018Physical appearanceGenderFemaleHairLight BrownEye ColorBluePersonal BackgroundTitle(s)ViceroyNunnally'sAdvisorOccupation(s)Civil ServantAllegiance(s)Holy Britannian EmpireBritannian MilitaryOtherSeeHoly Britannian EmpireReal World InformationFirst AppearanceThe Abandoned MaskLast AppearanceFinal Battle Tokyo IIVoice Actor(s)Akeno Watanabe (Japanese)Dorothy Elias-Fahn (English)Claudia Razzi (Italian)Sabine Jaeger(German)Laura Zichy (French)Alicia Lohmeyer(アリシア・ローマイヤArishia Rōmaiya) was an aide and advisor assigned by theHoly Britannian Empireto observeNunnallyupon her appointment as the newViceroyofArea 11. Alicia is a quintessential Britannian who regards Nunnally's pro-Eleven political stance with frigid opposition, but dutifully obeys regardless. However, she is willing to tell Nunnally her opinion, regardless of what Nunnally says, as long as it is for the better of Britannia. Despite the fact that she is supposed to be Nunnally's aid, Nunnally does not trust her; aware of the fact that Alicia Lohmeyer would find any chance to seize power to make living conditions worse for the Elevens should Nunnally let her guard down. Alicia also does not hesitate to lie to Nunnally about certain actions and abuse Nunnally's authority behind her back. This is evident when Alicia orders Kallen's execution, despite the fact that Nunnally would be completely against such a thing. As a Britannian, she also shows very little respect for Suzaku, despite the fact that he was the Knight of Seven at the time. Lohmeyer preparing to fire at the crowd of Zeros. characters.description: Alto WeinbergBiographical InformationNickname(s)Killer of the Royal FamilyWein-chanNationalityBritannianPhysical appearanceGenderMaleHairBlondEye ColorBluePersonal BackgroundRank(s)ViscountOccupation(s)KnightRelation(s)Earl Weinberg (Father)Annette Weinberg (Sister)Unnamed brothersGanelon (Brother-in-law)Gino Weinberg(descendant)Allegiance(s)Holy Britannian EmpireReal World InformationSeriesCode Geass: Renya of DarknessAlto Weinberg(アルト・ヴァインベルグAruto Vainberugu) is a mayor character featured inCode Geass: Renya of Darkness. He is a Britannian knight who came from across the sea to bringClaire li Britannia, to whom he feels a deep loyalty and devotion, back to Britannia. To fulfill his duty, he collaborates withRenyaand his friends. Alto is a mission driven individual. He values Claire's Safety above all else, and is willing to kill his own allies if they endanger her. With this mindset, he is able to acknowledge and excuse horrible action if they accomplish the mission, such as when he admonished the violence used by the mercenaries and apologizes, but simply writes the deaths off as unfortunate before moving on. characters.name: Alwin I
characters.description: Alwin IBiographical InformationNationalityCelticStatusDeceasedPhysical appearanceGenderMaleHairWhitePersonal BackgroundTitle(s)Legendary Founding Ancestor of theBritannian Imperial FamilyRank(s)ChieftainOccupation(s)Politician/SoldierRelation(s)Britannian Imperial FamilyAllegiance(s)Celtic Tribes of BritanniaReal World InformationFirst AppearanceCode Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion DVD Magazine Picture Drama 01 - Lelouch’s Britannia History CourseLast AppearanceCode Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion DVD Magazine Picture Drama 02 - Lelouch’s Britannia History CourseAlwin I(アルウィン1世Aruwin 1-sai) was a Celtic king from the First Centurya.t.b.whose first year of rule became the establishing year of theImperial Calendarused by theHoly Britannian Empire. Alwin I rose to prominence when he successfully stopped theRomans, from conquering theBritish Islesto become part of theRoman Republic. The Celts responded by choosing Alwin I as the Celtic super-king. His descendants would have also stopped Claudius' conquest of Britain in 43 AD, which would otherwise prevent the timeline from diverting. It is unknown how much his dynasty has ruled until the coming of Alfred the Great, (historically, Claudius managed to conquer Britain, up until Scotland, starting from 43 AD to around 54 or 55 AD). According toLelouch, his real historical existance in contested, meaning he can be nothing but a lie of the Britannia's propaganda.

He is a close friend ofMichele Manfrediand loyal retainer and successor to Grand DukeAugust Highland. General Andrea is shown be very honorable and deep thinking. He has complete respect from his subordinates and would rather retreat than lose more of his warriors. In the aftermath of being defeated by E.U "militia soldiers," his only thought was to collect the dead and give them a proper burial. Andrea is shown be very honorable and deep thinking. He has complete respect from his subordinates and would rather retreat than lose more of his warriors. In the aftermath of being defeated by E.U "militia soldiers," his only thought was to collect the dead and give them a proper burial. Andrea Farnese remains the only character in the series to recognize, if only vaguely, the twisted natures of bothShin Hyuga ShaingandJulius Kingsley. He has shown to be rather insightful, though he recognizes their true nature too late to prevent damage.

Darlton(Adoptive Son)Allegiance(s)Holy Britannian EmpireBritannian MilitaryKnightmare(s)GloucesterOtherSeeHoly Britannian EmpireReal World InformationFirst AppearanceThe Princess and the WitchLast AppearanceThe Collapsing StageVoice Actor(s)Kiyoyuki Yanada (Japanese)Travis Willingham (English)Alessandro Rossi (Italian)Axel Lutter(German)Andreas Darlton(アンドレアス・ダールトンAndoreasu Dāruton) was a confidante and a loyal subordinate to the Second PrincessCornelia. He held the rank of general in theBritannian Militaryas well as being the leader of theGlaston Knights. He is an extremely tall, tan man with rather rough facial features that fit a veteran. His signature sign are the diagonal scar running right across his face and his thick eyebrows. His hair is a lighter brown and is always slicked back. Darlton also has very broad shoulders and a big chest, befitting for his tall frame. Darlton is known to be the fatherly type. While he is able to be serious when necessary, for example in battle or when on duty, otherwise he is rather laid-back. He knows how to make a joke and is friendly towards everyone he interacts with him. It is stated that he also has a soft spot for war orphans like theGlaston Knightshe took in and is very good with children in general. Darlton is known to be the fatherly type. characters.name: Anna Clément
characters.description: Anna ClémentBiographical InformationNickname(s)"Boss" (by her Subordinate Chloe and Hilda)NationalityEuropeanAge17StatusAlivePhysical appearanceGenderFemaleHairLight PurpleEye ColorBright GreenHeight168 cm (5'6")Weight47 kgPersonal BackgroundTitle(s)Developer of the AlexanderRank(s)CaptainOccupation(s)ScientistMilitary OfficerAllegiance(s)Europia UnitedClement IndustrieswZEROReal World InformationSeriesCode Geass: Akito the ExiledCreator(s)CLAMPTakahiro KimuraVoice Actor(s)Ai Kayano (Japanese)Bryn Appril (English)Anna Clément(アンナ・クレマンAnna Kureman) is a genius scientist and the developer of theAlexander. She is a childhood friend ofLeila Malcal, whom she serves under in thewZEROunit. She has the rank of Captain in theE.U.army. Anna is an extremely beautiful young woman, possessing a light yet somewhat pale skin tone, sparkling green eyes, and extremely thick bright purple hair that reaches down to below her waistline, with one long strand falling down her front. She is slightly taller than Leila. She wears a long dress-like version of the standard E.U. uniform, with her skirt reaching down to just above her knees, while also wearing boots that reach just below them. She also often wears a set of red reading glasses. Anna is a girl who is exceptionally kind, compassionate, and selfless. She cares deeply for those around her and is always their needs before her own. Despite being a soldier for the E.U., Anna has been shown to be a gentle girl who detests the violence of the war withEuro Britannia, and shares Leila’s discomfort about how Japanese soldiers are used as cannon fodder by the European government. Anna is a girl who is exceptionally kind, compassionate, and selfless. She cares deeply for those around her and is always their needs before her own. Despite being a soldier for the E.U., Anna has been shown to be a gentle girl who detests the violence of the war withEuro Britannia, and shares Leila’s discomfort about how Japanese soldiers are used as cannon fodder by the European government. Anna is also a very gifted scientist and engineer, with her being regarded as a scientific genius, having done feats such as having disassembled and analyzed a BritannianGlasgowon her own at the age of 12. Her talents were such that even at a young age, she had helped speed up the development of Europia'sPanzer Hummeland was able to allow it to be fielded sooner. She has such an interest in her work that she tends to get too excited and explain things that normal people are unable to follow along with, and apologizes for being inconsiderate. However, she also becomes overjoyed when someone like Yukiya is able to follow it. Despite this, Anna secretly dislikes having to build weapons, instead wishing to have her creations help others instead of hurting them. Outside of machines, she also loves insects and is an entomologist. characters.description: Anya AlstreimBiographical InformationFull nameAnya AlstreimNationalityBritannianAge15 (at R2)17 (Lelouch Of The Re;surrection)Borna.t.b.October 26, 2003StatusAlivePhysical appearanceGenderFemaleHairLight PinkEye ColorRedHeight163 cm (5'4")Zodiac signScorpioPersonal BackgroundTitle(s)Knight of Six(Formerly)Rank(s)NobleKnight of the Round(Fomerly)Occupation(s)Military OfficerKnightmare PilotStudentPersonal Knight ofRolo Vi Britannia(Nightmare of Nunnally Only)Allegiance(s)Holy Britannian Empire(Formerly)Knights of the Round(Formerly)Britannian Military(Formerly)Ashford Academy(Formerly)Student Council(Formerly)Holy Nation of Eden Vital (Nightmare of Nunnally Only)Eden Vital Order(Nightmare of Nunnally Only)Knightmare(s)MordredZetlandMordred BuildupModifiedTristan(Nightmare of Nunnally manga only)OtherSeeKnights of the RoundReal World InformationFirst AppearanceThe Day a Demon AwakensLast AppearanceLelouch of the Re;surrectionVoice Actor(s)Yūko Gotō(Japanese)Stephanie Sheh(English)Letizia Ciampa (Italian)Millie Forsberg(German)Anya Alstreim(アーニャ・アールストレイムĀnya Ārusutoreimu) is a major supporting character inCode Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion R2. Her Seiyū is Yūko Gotō, and in the English dub she is voiced by Stephanie Sheh. She is theKnight of Six. 17 (Lelouch Of The Re;surrection) Anya is subtly noted as being a beautiful young girl, with a petite build, pale complexion, light pink hair tied up in a ponytail that always has thick strands of hair that falls next to her face and that also creates bangs on her forehead, and a rouge-red eyes. Anya comes off as rather stoic, deadpan and uninterested, similar to a person who suffers from depression. Anya maintains a detached attitude in most situations, usually declaring most things to be boring or dull. However, this detached attitude also gives her a lack of "common sense"; she had piloted her personal Knightmare Frame for the sake of capturingLelouch’s hat, disregarding the fact that she was piloting her Mordred in a non-combat area and had aroused the suspicion of the military and the Knight Police, sending the Tokyo Concession into Defcon 2. Anya is loyal to Britannia and her Emperor, never questioning or disobeying orders given to her. This loyalty is further shown when Lelouch takes control of the empire after "killing"Charles zi Britannia, Anya sided withSchneizeland his faction, seeing him as the legitimate of the two. On the battlefield she's a deadly and fully capable pilot, showing no mercy to her enemies. Her fighting style reflects her heavily-armored Knightmare; she annihilates her enemies with overwhelming force and doesn't hesitate to kill disabled foes. Despite her stoic personality and ruthlessness in battle, Anya does have a softer side as she has been shown to be warm and caring towards her friends. She treats Suzaku as an equal despite him being an Eleven, she showed deep sadness along with the others afterShirley's death, and she appears to like cats. Anya is also rather protective

characters.name: Anya Alstreim/Nightmare of Nunnally
characters.description: Anya Alstreim/Nightmare of NunnallyBiographical InformationNationalityBritannianStatusUnknownPhysical appearanceGenderFemaleHairPinkEye ColorPinkPersonal BackgroundTitle(s)Head Knight of the Eden Vital Order's Heretic Trial DivisionRank(s)Head KnightOccupation(s)Personal KnightKnightmare PilotAllegiance(s)Rolo vi BritanniaHoly Nation of Eden VitalEden Vital OrderHeretic Trial DivisionKnightmare(s)Tristan(Modified)Real World InformationFirst AppearanceCode Geass: Nightmare of NunnallyLast AppearanceCode Geass: Nightmare of NunnallyAnya Alstreim(アーニャ・アールストレイムĀnya Ārusutoreimu) is the personal Knight ofRolo vi Britanniaand Head Knight of theEden Vital Order. Anya is normally a calm a quiet person who dutifully follow Rolo's orders. However she has also shown a strong amount of pride in her knightmare skills, talking down to Suzaku, referring to him as a "little boy" that she was going to punish during their duel. She also seems to have a great amount of care for Rolo, as she became his knight to look after him and was greatly saddened when he began to degrade. It is later revealed that Marianne's soul was inhabiting her body, so it is unclear how much of Anya's personality was her own and how much was due to Marianne. His real name isArpirica Hueden(アルピリカ・ヒューエデンArupirika Hyūeden). Ar activating his Geass Ar's Geass is the power of Phase Transition, manifesting in his left eye. Using this Geass, it allows him to observe events in history. While using this power, he is not aware of himself, and watches events unfold in a manner he compares to watching a movie.

characters.name: Ash Phoenix
characters.description: Ash PhoenixBiographical InformationAge19Borna.t.b.July 29th 2006StatusDeceasedPhysical appearanceGenderMaleHairLight brown with a blue bangEye ColorLight blueBlood typeBPersonal BackgroundTitle(s)Knight of Empress Sakuya me Britannia (Currently)Knight of Thirteen (Former)Occupation(s)MercenaryAssassin (original occupation)Relation(s)Norland von Lunebelg(Adoptive father)Nichol Phoenix(Younger brother)Allegiance(s)Nameless MercenariesNeo Britannian Empire(formerly)Holy Britannian EmpireKnights of the Round(Former)Knightmare(s)Zi-ApolloZi-OrtygiaReal World InformationSeriesCode Geass: Roze of the RecaptureCreator(s)Takahiro KimuraHidekazu ShimamuraVoice Actor(s)Makoto Furukawa (Japanese)Cory Yee (English)Ash Phoenix(アッシュ・フェニックスAsshu Fenikkusu) is the deuteragonist ofCode Geass: Roze of the Recapture. He is the adopted son ofNorland von Lunebelgand a former member of theKnights of the Round. Knight of Thirteen (Former) Assassin (original occupation) Ash presents himself as a cold and professional young man, usually focused on the mission and showing little emotion towards much else. This is especially reflected in his fighting style, often dispatching enemies with efficiency and not speaking unless necessary. Despite that, he does possess a more compassionate side, often taking in stray animals and caring for them alongside Rozé. He can also be somewhat shy, nervously hiding behindTomo-omi OdawhenYoko Arakisaw him in his underwear. He views Roze as his most important person, though that is because Sakuya geassed him to do so. He was immediately taken with Sakuya when he met her as Raspberry, being much more cheerful and talkative with her then he normally is.

characters.description: Ashley AshraBiographical InformationFull nameAshley AshraNationalityBritannianAge17StatusAlivePhysical appearanceGenderMaleHairOrangeEye ColorRedPersonal BackgroundRank(s)Warrant Officer (Former)Knight(Formerly)Occupation(s)Leader (Former)Knightmare Pilot (Former)Military Officer (Former)Allegiance(s)Holy Britannian Empire(Former)Britannian Military(Former)Euro Britannia(Former)Holy Order of Michael(Former)Asura Strike Force (Former)United Republic of Europia(Former)wZERO(Former)Knightmare(s)Gloucester SwordsmanAhuramazdaAlexander RedorgaOtherSeeCode Geass: Akito the ExiledReal World InformationFirst AppearanceThe Wyvern Divided (episode)Last AppearanceTo Beloved Ones (episode)Creator(s)CLAMPVoice Actor(s)Takuma Terashima (Japanese) Joel McDonald (English)Massimo Di Benedetto (Italian)Ashley Ashra(アシュレイ・アシュラAshurei Ashura) is a Euro-Britannian knight. Add information A wild, impulsive and arrogant man who believes that only luck dictates one's life, he has shown to have little regard for his own life as he 'possesses' an abundant supply of luck. While reckless with his own life, he fiercely cares for the lives of his comrades and if one is killed in battle, Ashley will become hellbent on avenging them no matter how long it takes. He was also the leader of one of the units within theHoly Order of Michael.
